name: Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Place the sweet potatoes in cold water, bring to a boil and cook until tender, about 15-20 minutes.
3. Drain the potatoes and mash them hot with the butter and sugar. Let the mixture cool slightly.
4. Stir in the beaten eggs, buttermilk, and vanilla extract.
5. Pour into the prepared crust and bake until a knife inserted comes out clean.
